Tawil's exalt allows her to pick 3 of 5 cards from the current realm. The realms are caro (red), aequor (blue), chaos (yellow), and ultra (purple). Chaos adapts to the realm it's mixed with, so mixing it with caro for example would make the realm Pure Caro.

This means if you have Tawil, Aigis, Faint, and Thais in a team, then the current realm is Pure Caro. When you use her Exalt, she will randomly draw 5 caro skill cards and you pick 3 of them to put in your hand. The skill cards can be from any caro awakener, so you can get a Thais or Sorel card from her exalt

content: Is Clem better than Horla for the twins?
People usually run both

But the tl;dr version of Ultra mechanics is that you have Ultraspace which holds the first card that you play each turn. When it's filled up, you can get a free turn with all the cards inside it. Alternatively, you can Annihilate the leftmost card to get an Insight (1 arithmetica, 1 draw) once per turn.

Many Ultra characters also have Leap or Quasar effects which trigger if the card is played first in the turn. Leap effects also take effect during your ultra turn, while Quasar cards get a 1 arith discount instead.

You can play Ultra spamming annihilate for free arith/draw every turn, or build up a big ultra turn, or somewhere in between. Note that mixed Ultra teams have reduced card effects during ultra turn so they tend to rely a bit less on bursting on during that extra turn than pure Ultra might.
